tweets.title: HTML 正在成为新的 Markdown：Claude Code 团队成员分享用 HTML 替代 Markdown 的工作流
tweets.desc: HTML is the new markdown. I've stopped writing markdown files for almost everything and switched to using Claude Code to generate HTML for me. This is why.

tweets.title: Claude Code 生成 HTML 文档的示例演示
tweets.desc: You can also see example HTML documents I've generated here: https://t.co/QuTMbHtdlc

tweets.title: AI 对齐研究的积极愿景：不只是防止不良行为，更要为模型树立诚实和积极的价值观
tweets.desc: Alignment research often has to focus on averting concerning behaviors, but I think the positive vision for this kind of training is one where we can give models an honest and positive vision for what AI models can be and why. I'm excited about the future of this work.

tweets.title: Claude Mythos 预览版在 METR 基准测试中时间跨度超越其他模型 2 倍以上
tweets.desc: An early Claude Mythos Preview snapshot we provided METR has a time horizon of more than 2x the next best model on their 80% success rate benchmark

tweets.title: 企业级 Token 预算管理：大型企业将面临 AI Agent 时代的全新资源分配挑战
tweets.desc: A common trend emerging in larger enterprises is token budgeting as a major topic. As agents can do more and more long running tasks, allocation of tokens across teams becomes a very real thing. Companies spend time deciding how much to spend on talent, marketing, laptop setups, even lunches — tokens will be no different. Ultimately team leaders will need budgets for this, but most lack adequate visibility and controls. We'll need all new software just to solve this problem, and it's probably an opportunity for startups in its own right.

tweets.title: 个人软件时代即将到来
128GB MacBook Pro 上运行 1M Token 上下文窗口的 Coding Agent，令人震撼
tweets.desc: Downloading now... 1M token context window with supposedly usable coding agent capability all on a 128GB Macbook Pro is 🤯

tweets.title: AI Agent 定价模式可能不会完全走向按量计费，更像席位模式
tweets.desc: The more I think about AI agents, the less obvious it is that pricing goes purely consumption-based. Token costs matter... but enterprise agents may need identities, roles, auth, budgets, audit logs etc. That sounds oddly seat-like? just not human-seat-like

tweets.title: 用 OpenAI Realtime 2 API 构建 YouTube 实时 AI 助手浏览器扩展
tweets.desc: Built a 'YouTube realtime copilot' browser extension using OpenAI's realtime 2 API. The agent watches the video alongside you, and can answer any question you have about what was just said via realtime voice chat. It can differentiate the YouTube's audio stream and your voice, so it doesn't confuse the video as commands, and stays silent unless you ask something!

tweets.title: 32 套精美 HTML 幻灯片模板已在 AnyGen 上线，无需编程 Agent 即可即插即用
tweets.desc: All 32 Beautiful HTML Slide Templates are now available on AnyGen, it's plug-and-play even for those without a coding agent

tweets.title: GPT Realtime 2 像黑魔法一样强大，正在解锁无数新应用

tweets.title: 大公司与初创公司在 AI 采纳态度上出现鲜明分歧
tweets.desc: Seeing the clear dichotomy in my responses. Every large company manager: you know nothing, we need to be invested, this is how it's always been done. Every startup manager: thanks for saying this, yes, feel this in my bones.
